title: MARKSMAN Garden Pressure Sprayer 8 L
features: Includes variable Jet nozzle for precise application of plant feeds/watering etc
Suitable for use with most garden and household chemicals
Ideal for use around the garden, greenhouse and home
description: Selection of Hand sprayers with powerful pump action and pressure relief valve has been made with a shatterproof and frost-resistant construction. Includes variable jet nozzle for precise application of plant feeds/watering etc. Suitable for use with most garden and household chemicals.
